sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] == 24 and node['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Player: boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Check last animation frames to see what happened
print(f"Last animation entries: {len(last_animation)}")
for i, entry in enumerate(last_animation):
    print(f"Entry {i}: action={entry.action}, frames={len(entry.frames)}")
    if len(entry.frames) > 0:
        last_f = entry.frames[-1]
        for n in last_f.segmentation['nodes']:
            if n['pixels'] == 24 and n['color'] == 'b':
                print(f"  Player after {entry.action}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
